policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-cr-09 - Connected Registries'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Container+Registry#IncidentremediationContainerRegistry-drcp-cr-09 .
